content.problemStatement:
Consider any two sets of integers strictly larger than 111, denoted by PPP and QQQ. The set PPP is said to be divisible by QQQ if each integer in PPP is divisible by at least one (not necessarily the same for each of them) integer in QQQ.

You are given a set A={A1,A2,‚Ä¶,AN}A = \{A_1, A_2, \ldots, A_N\}A={A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã}, where Ai‚â§CA_i \le CAi‚Äã‚â§C for each valid iii (note that CCC does not necessarily equal max‚Å°(A)\max(A)max(A)). Find any set B={B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BM}B = \{B_1, B_2, \ldots, B_M\}B={B1‚Äã,B2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,BM‚Äã} such that:


AAA is divisible by BBB
2‚â§Bi‚â§C2 \le B_i \le C2‚â§Bi‚Äã‚â§C for each valid iii
MMM is the smallest positive integer such that there is at least one set satisfying the previous two conditions
If there are multiple answers, you may find any one of them.
constraints: 2‚â§Ai‚â§C2 \leq A_i \leq C2‚â§Ai‚Äã‚â§C for each valid iii
the sum of CCC over all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
there are at most 101010 test cases where C>750C \gt 750C>750
there are at most 101010 test cases where C>750C \gt 750C>750
**Subtask #4 (40 points):** there is at most 111 test case where C>3,000C \gt 3,000C>3,000
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and CCC.
The second line contains NNN distinct space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print two lines. The first of these lines should contain a single integer MMM. The second line should contain MMM space-separated integers B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BMB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_MB1‚Äã,B2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,BM‚Äã satisfying the given conditions.
